domains.name: Design and implement build and release pipelines

questions.text: You are preparing for Microsoft Azure DevOps Engineer Expert and reviewing Design and implement DevOps processes. Which source aligns with official Microsoft Learn and Azure documentation?
questions.explanation: Use AZ-400 study guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: A regulated workload requires the organization to build and release pipelines as code. Which solution is BEST?

Two designs were proposed. Design A would build and release pipelines as code. Design B would cache dependencies in pipelines. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: YAML pipelines version CI/CD definitions. Compare with Pipeline caching tasks: Caching speeds up builds.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would cache dependencies in pipelines. Design B would deploy to multiple stages with gates. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: Caching speeds up builds. Compare with YAML environments and approvals: Environments add deployment controls.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to secure cloud posture continuously. Which approach is MOST reliable?
